features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (round up) to any Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution check that doesn't already use it. Your running long jump distance increases by your Strength modifier in feet.

features.name: Additional Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a second option from the Fighting Style class feature.

features.name: Superior Critical
features.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18-20.

features.name: Survivor
features.description: At the start of each of your turns, regain 5 + your Constitution modifier hit points if you have no more than half your hit points left (and more than 0).

featureChoices.name: Fighting Style
featureChoices.description: Adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

options.name: Archery
options.description: +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons.

options.name: Dueling
options.description: +2 damage when wielding a one-handed melee weapon and no other weapon.

options.name: Great Weapon Fighting
options.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice of two-handed or versatile melee weapons.

options.name: Protection
options.description: Reaction while holding a shield: impose disadvantage on an attack against a creature within 5 feet.

options.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
options.description: Add your ability modifier to the damage of off-hand attacks.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a combat style (archery, defense, dueling, ...).

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: On your turn, use a bonus action to regain 1d10 + your fighter level hit points. Once used, you must finish a short or long rest before using it again.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: On your turn, take one additional action. Once used, you must finish a short or long rest before using it again.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: On your turn, take one additional action. You can use Action Surge twice before a rest, but only once on the same turn.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack three times whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack four times whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: Reroll a saving throw that you fail; you must use the new roll. Once used, you must finish a long rest before using it again.

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: Reroll a saving throw that you fail; you must use the new roll. Two uses between long rests.

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: Reroll a saving throw that you fail; you must use the new roll. Three uses between long rests.
